tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to blacklist ORCH-001 and QUALITY-001 task type patterns from taskTypePatterns array. Add validation to reject any task IDs matching these prefixes in generation pipeline.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts add cascadeFailureDetector function that monitors consecutive task rejections. If >3 same-type tasks fail in 10min window, halt sprint generation and alert. Prevents infinite loops.
Edit backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts to add 2-hour approval timeout. Tasks stuck in pending state auto-transition to 'expired' status. Prevents queue blocking and restores flow capacity.
Update backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts to reject tasks with context >600 chars or multi-file deliverables before queue insertion. Prevents LLM truncation failures downstream.

In backend/src/telegram/ceoBot.ts add /abort_sprint command handler. Immediately marks all pending tasks as 'cancelled', clears orchestrator queue, allows fresh sprint generation. CEO override capability.

Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to enforce maxTasksPerSprint=9 and minTasksPerSprint=7 validation. Reject sprint plans outside this range before execution to prevent overload/underutilization.
